required_future_exit_adjudication_family.authority_role_rule: A future Gate C exit adjudication may count only a same-head receipt family that declares both receipt_role and subject_head and remains bound to the shared T17 same-head authority contract and the T19 tracked-counted-receipt carrier-overread contract.

fail_conditions: Any live-beats-baseline outcome claim appears before a same-head authoritative exit adjudication receipt exists.
Any Gate C exit claim appears in the criteria-contract tranche.
Any carrier receipt, cross-head receipt, or documentary-only surface is allowed to stand in for same-head authority.
Any alias scorecard or competitive scorecard is allowed to stand in for canonical comparator truth.
Any comparator truth is refreshed, any comparator row is added, or any comparator semantics are rewritten under the exit-criteria contract label.
next_lawful_move_after_contract: Gate C exit adjudication only after the same-head authoritative proof chain exists end-to-end.
reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
claim_boundary: This contract defines the future Gate C exit proof law only. It does not claim Gate C exit, does not claim that live beats baseline, and does not widen comparator, civilization, externality, or product scope.
